creator: andy@neu.net
text:
I am getting the following failure trying to update:

[root@FBSD14 /usr/ports/textproc/intltool]# make 
===>  License GPLv2 accepted by the user
===>   intltool-0.51.0_1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> intltool-0.51.0.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/gnome.
=> Attempting to fetch https://launchpad.net/intltool/trunk/0.51.0/+download/intltool-0.51.0.tar.gz
intltool-0.51.0.tar.gz                                 158 kB  606 kBps    01s
===> Fetching all distfiles required by intltool-0.51.0_1 for building
===>  Extracting for intltool-0.51.0_1
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for gnome/intltool-0.51.0.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for intltool-0.51.0_1
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for intltool-0.51.0_1 from /usr/ports/textproc/intltool/files
===>   intltool-0.51.0_1 depends on package: p5-XML-Parser>=0 - found
===>   intltool-0.51.0_1 depends on package: libiconv>=1.14_11 - found
===>   intltool-0.51.0_1 depends on package: gmake>=4.3 - found
===>   intltool-0.51.0_1 depends on package: perl5>=5.34<5.35 - found
===>  Configuring for intltool-0.51.0_1
configure: loading site script /usr/ports/Templates/config.site
checking for a BSD-compatible install... /usr/bin/install -c
checking whether build environment is sane... yes
checking for a thread-safe mkdir -p... (cached) /bin/mkdir -p
checking for gawk... (cached) /usr/bin/awk
checking whether gmake sets $(MAKE)... yes
checking whether gmake supports nested variables... yes
checking for perl... (cached) /usr/local/bin/perl
checking for perl >= 5.8.1... 5.34.3
checking for XML::Parser... configure: error: XML::Parser perl module is required for intltool
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
Please report the problem to desktop@FreeBSD.org [maintainer] and attach the
"/usr/ports/textproc/intltool/work/intltool-0.51.0/config.log" including the
output of the failure of your make command. Also, it might be a good idea to
provide an overview of all packages installed on your system (e.g. a
/usr/local/sbin/pkg-static info -g -Ea).
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/textproc/intltool
